reviews.title: Terrible Service - Never Come Back Again!!!!
reviews.text: The reception staff was extremely unpleasant. Upon arriving with a young child, all our requests were ignored and we were treated poorly with inadequate service. Despite agreeing to a late checkout until 2pm when asked, we were unexpectedly told to vacate the room by 1.30pm after returning at 1.15pm. The receptionists were dishonest, providing terrible service and negative emotions. It is best to avoid this place, as the staff, from security to reception, are impolite. They even judge you for your attire and may even mock you.
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Mai Hong,

Xin Chao, Thank you for the feedback on your experience and the review. We sincerely appreciate your insight because it helps us raise the bar and build better guest experience. It is certainly most unfortunate that we fell short on this occasion and apologize for the high volume of service during pick season that we can not adapt both of your  Early check in and Late check out as you expect. 
Feedback like this helps us constantly improve our guest experiences by knowing what we are doing right and what we can work on, appreciate the time taken to send us this helpful response.
Please do not hesitate to contact us for any further assistance.

Warm regards
Hotel Management Team

reviews.title: Disappointed missing breakfast and not being able to use free late checkout option.
reviews.positives: Good Swimming Pool
reviews.negatives: I didn’t like how the menu in the room says breakfast until 10:30am as it made me believe I had until that time to get my breakfast.  I went to eat at 9:45am and was told I missed the breakfast by 15 minutes which was extremely disappointing.  After this happened I saw on the website that there was a free late checkout option (depending on availability) as this option would have eased my disappointment on missing the breakfast which I had paid for, but the hotel was booked and they were unable to accommodate me on this.

reviews.title: Housekeeper had stolen my $800 usd
reviews.text:
Housekeeper had stolen my $800 usd.
I had stayed there for a week. The very first day i requested front desk that i do not want to make up room. The second day ,they sent housekeeper to my room but they were deny by my wife. However, they still come to my room without notification to me on the third day.
Not only they came to my room but also folded my clothes nicely and put in my luggage after searching my money. ( my opinion: they support not to touch to my clothes) because i trust the hotel cause of 5* hotel, i left couple $$$ usd in my jacket’s pocket.
Pay attention : their housekeeper were not staff of hotel. The hotel hired and paid them by day.
They might not checked background clearly .
I also check google review that one of guest of this hotel had lost $1000 usd about 3 year ago
reviews.response:
Dear Guest,
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent stay with us.

Please accept our sincerest apologies for the disturbance you have experienced during your stay regarding the missing belongings case you reported. We did carry out an investigation and unfortunately the result is negative. We would like you to know that we take those claims very seriously and we have formalized a full investigation with both the police and our staff. We are sorry that these events have unfolded however there is no evidence found by either the police or management that any of our staff are responsible. 
In each room we have a safety box where guests are advised to keep their valuable belongings there, which is both safe and secure and we can refer to whenever there is a problem.

As we strive to provide the highest level of service every day; we truly regret to learn that we did not meet your expectation. Rest assured that these issues will be looked into.

Sin

reviews.title: Slow check out process, being charge for items we did not use
reviews.text: The hotel is nice, overal stay was good until check out. Eventhough we were the only one at the counter when check out, the processs took a long time. We had to wait and wait before we was informed that we used a red top aqua bottle or something which costed 55000 vnd which we never use and did not even know what it looks like. Our friends and the driver was waiting for us for some times already so we did not evev bother to fight so we just paid 55000 vnd so that we can go . The money was not the issue, we tipped the bus boy more than the 55000vnd but being charged for something we did not use and was not even aware that that item even exist was what make us mad. Based on the bad experience we do not recommend the hotel to anyone. If you use the hotel, then make sure that you check out the fridge when check in and make sure that you wont be charge for unuse things like us

As a result, the same issue has happened like what exactly has happened from previous time. I am so frustrated and unsure whether they do out themselves into guests shoes. The room ís always clean and nice as usual, only staffs customer service and indifferent behavior obviously made me down no matte how many times I do have the same issues. To be honest, I would never stay here again if second 5 star hotel would be found in Tay Ninh. Till then, I decided not to show up at the point of the check in anymore as I always feel unhappy and first long bad experience is all what I got. 
Breakfast is nice as always but closing time should be at 10:00 not 9:30 as nigh owls often wake up late at weekend

reviews.text:
The location is fantastic
Breakfast is so great or rather much more better co pared to other 5 star.s in Việt Nam. Variety choice of breakfast such as broken rice, beef noodle, …., jackfruit, ko tan, water melon. 
The restaurant design is so beautiful, looks luxurious and cozy.
The hotel room design is very modern, , room , bed, pillow , towels are very clean and smell good
The only thing I don’t like is the way front desk staffs handle my request for early check around 10:30am as I am traveling with my elderly mom who is old and her legs are in pain. My first call made on 2 July, 2024 which was handled by male receptionist who don’t accommodate my request but try to upsell me with additional charge and directlly mentioned on the  condition for early check in. My second call was made at noon when we are 1,5hrs away from tge hotel . Female staff ( Khoa) also dien”t offer me with early check in and showed her ignorance on offering early check. She then mentioned about hotel’s rule and regulations for early in policy without paying attention on my highlighted information related to my elderly mom and young kinds traveling along. Then I tried to ask for late out and maximum 30’ is what she confirmed . When I said that I was not happy as  hotel seems not to be flexible and shows no care on customer’s comfort and stay experience,  5 star hotel should be more flexible and shows more high level of service. She even kept saying what she wanted , just interrupted  what I was trying to say  and spoke out what she wanted without waiting for others. She even did not care what I was about to do when I strongly mentioned about my bad first impression and hotel will get 1 star from me. She said nothing and showed no care at all.
I love the hotel , location , the room, especially breakfast and I would recommend this hotel no matter how bad I felt about the front desk staffs.

reviews.negatives: 作為西寧首屈一指的五星級飯店，應該要有能力提供西寧主要景點（黑婆山、高台教寺廟）相關資訊以及旅館附近餐廳/咖啡廳/小吃相關資訊，例如至少可以作個「旅遊交通路線示意圖」或是「旅館附近餐廳/咖啡廳/小吃地圖」，可惜本間旅館對這部分的經營與教育訓練似乎不太夠，讓我覺得稍微意外

reviews.title: 價格跟服務匹配的飯店
reviews.positives:
1.有給迎賓茶，或許對4、5星級飯店，給迎賓茶很合理，但因為我是騎車旅遊，騎了約5個小時才到，所以很曬很熱，有迎賓茶讓人感覺很好
2.有給免費的下午茶點心，我不太確定觸發條件為何，因為上次跟同事一起住這間時沒有，不過這次來有點心吃，對午餐吃很少的人來說，很感動
3.我有使用到洗衣服務，原本以為要隔天才拿得到衣服，結果提交申請後，約2個小時就拿到了，速度快到讓我有點嚇到，效率蠻高的
4.因為是除夕夜入住，所以飯店有通知會舉行倒數派對(有請專業DJ，需付入場費200,000盾)，並通知會比較吵，我覺得有通知是有尊重客人(我房間在十幾樓，所以聽到音量剛剛好，低樓層住戶比較容易被影響)
5.住宿的話停機車免費，會需要跟飯店拿票給停車場警衛看; 房間內設施都很頂級
reviews.negatives:
1.洗衣服務有一點偏貴，但因為這間是西寧市的高級飯店，而且洗衣效率高，所以我認為還算可接受
2.我有在房間內叫了飯店內的餐點(比薩和濃湯)，我覺得同樣的價格，去外面買可以吃到更好的，不過因為勝在房內點餐方便，所以我認為還算可接受

reviews.title: Kindness and cleanliness are the best.
reviews.text: I came here because I had some business nearby, and thanks to the discount, I was able to book accommodation at a low price. They gave me a room on a high floor, and the night view was quite beautiful! I enjoyed the spa and massage very much and was very satisfied. If I have the chance to come to Vietnam again, I plan to come back. There’s also a night market nearby, as well as a supermarket, cinema, and more, so it was very convenient!
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Kim Miju,
Thank you very much for sharing your lovely review with us.
We are truly delighted to know that you enjoyed your stay, especially the cleanliness, the warm hospitality of our team, and the beautiful night view from your high-floor room. It is also wonderful to hear that you had a satisfying and relaxing experience at our spa and massage services — your happiness is the greatest reward for our team.
We are glad that you found our location convenient, with easy access to the nearby night market making your trip even more enjoyable.
Thank you once again for your kind words and support. We sincerely look forward to welcoming you back on your next visit to Vietnam for another memorable stay at Melia Vinpearl Tay Ninh.
Kind regards,
Thoai Nguyen
Guest Experience

reviews.title: Beautiful, comfortable hotel.
reviews.text: The hotel is beautiful, clean, new, and worth the money. The swimming pool is nice but a bit small, with floats available for children to borrow and swim in the adult pool, while the children's pool is indoors with no sunlight, a bit dark, small, and cold. My room had a spacious view, with a beautiful sunset. Next to the hotel, there is Vincom, but there is nothing for small children to play with, and it is somewhat quiet.
reviews.response:

Thay mặt khách sạn Melia Vinpearl Tây Ninh, chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ những cảm nhận chân thành sau kỳ nghỉ vừa qua.
Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng Quý khách hài lòng với không gian khách sạn sạch sẽ, tiện nghi và thoải mái, cũng như khung cảnh hoàng hôn từ phòng nghỉ. Cảm ơn Quý khách đã đánh giá cao chất lượng dịch vụ và cơ sở vật chất của chúng tôi.
Chúng tôi cũng xin ghi nhận những góp ý chân thành của Quý khách về khu vực hồ bơi và khu vui chơi dành cho trẻ em. Đây sẽ là những ý kiến quý báu để chúng tôi xem xét, cải thiện và nâng cao trải nghiệm của khách hàng trong tương lai.
Rất mong sẽ sớm được chào đón Quý khách quay trở lại Melia Vinpearl Tây Ninh trong những chuyến đi sắp tới.

Bộ phận Trải nghiệm Khách hàng

reviews.title: A wonderful pilgrimage.
reviews.text:
Many times I have traveled to Tay Ninh for a day, so I have never stayed overnight at a hotel, but this time for the group of mothers and aunts going on a pilgrimage, choosing Melia Vinpearl Hotel was an excellent choice. The view overlooks the mountains directly; I only planned to go on a spiritual pilgrimage and did not think Tay Ninh had much beautiful scenery, but unexpectedly, I could enjoy the beautiful mountain views from the hotel high up. The interior is also clean and fragrant, and the food is delicious.

Not to mention the service quality is very nice. The staff members are extremely friendly and enthusiastic. Next time I go to Tay Ninh, I will stop by again!
reviews.response: Xin chào chị Ngoc, Thay mặt khách sạn Melia Vinpearl Tay Ninh, chúng tôi xin gửi lời cám ơn quý khách đã tin dùng dịch vụ của khách sạn. Chúng tôi đánh giá cao lời nhận xét của quý khách về dịch vụ của khách sạn. Nhận xét của quý khách là thước đo, đồng thời là nguồn động lực để chúng tôi tiếp tục làm tốt hơn, đáp ứng kỳ vọng và yêu cầu, thị hiếu ngày càng cao của khách hàng. Chúng tôi hy vọng được chào đón quý khách trong kỳ nghỉ tiếp theo. Trân Trọng, Ban Quản Lý Khách Sạn

reviews.text:
Everything was just great. This is my first time staying here but I was pretty impressed. The facility: the gym, swimming pool, sauna and restaurant and bar/lounge were well built and decorated. The staff was not only professional but friendly at the same time. It was my birthday and they sent me a gift to my room which made me really surprised. For sure we will come back here. 

The only thing if I could say is the breakfast buffet... I mean it was definitely good enough compared to the price I paid but I felt like it wasn't amazing. I had breakfast here only once and so I shouldn't even make a comment.  Anyway I had an amazing time here. Thank you.

reviews.positives: Bữa sáng tốt, ngon. Cần thay đổi thực đơn sau 2 ngày.
reviews.negatives: Giường ngủ không có tấm lót chống dơ cho khách ngủ . Khi khách vô tình có kinh nguyệt trong đêm làm dính gra giường thì phải đền phí vệ sinh thêm 250.000 đồng đưa tiền mặt tại quầy và trả tiền túi đựng đồ dơ trong phòng do khách lấy túi đi, tổng cộng khách phải trả thêm 266.000 đồng . Số tiền không đáng bao nhiêu nhưng với khách sạn 5 sao, các bạn thu như vậy có đáng không?? Trong khi khách thuê phòng là đã trả phí cho vệ sinh và các dụng cụ túi đựng , khách đâu có làm rách gra giường của các bạn, vì sự tế nhị nên khách trả tiền theo yêu cầu nhưng các bạn bị mất điểm trong lòng khách hàng. Có vẻ như Vinpear đang tính toán với khách hàng quá đáng, hơi buồn nhẹ trong chuyến đi này.

reviews.title: Mountain view room
reviews.text: I checked in early and didn't receive my room, so I asked the staff for help with my luggage. The staff was very enthusiastic in helping with my things. I was at the front desk when they offered me a drink, but at that moment I was distracted and went back to my seat, yet they still left the drink there, which I found very odd. When I got to my room, there was no welcome drink as mentioned in reviews online. The room was beautiful, clean, and had a chill mountain view perfect for enjoying the evening. I found breakfast to be ordinary, so I won't comment on that. Top 1 in Tay Ninh right now is not an exaggeration.

reviews.title: A large hotel, equipped with amenities, worth experiencing when visiting Tay Ninh.
reviews.text: The hotel is located right in the center of Tay Ninh, next to Vincom, and quite close to Ba Mountain. The building is tall, offering a very spacious view. The rooms are large, clean, and fully equipped. Since I traveled with my elderly parents, I booked a 5-star hotel for their comfort. The staff worked quickly, and their attitude was normal; they didn’t help guests with their luggage... The staff was not as friendly as at Melia Ho Tram; among the resorts in the Melia system, I still find Ho Tram to be the best. Another drawback was when the receptionist took my phone to check the booking number, they opened Google Maps to rate the hotel 5 stars without asking me?! Haha, it was the first time I encountered this situation. I noticed they were just swiping, and when I took the phone back to check, I found out. I don’t know if it is a hotel policy or what, but management should seriously review this as it invades the privacy of guests. Overall, my experience here was pretty okay. The breakfast buffet didn’t have too many items, mainly Vietnamese dishes, which suited my taste.

This hotel is the tallest in Tay Ninh and is in the centre of the town. 
Buffet are at reasonable price and place is very pleasant and quiet.
reviews.response:
Xin chao Heng,
It was our great pleasure to be of your service and thank you for taking time to write us such a positive feedback and provided plenty of useful information for our future guests. We are delighted to read that you had enjoyed all aspects in our property and had wonderful time in our hotel. We tailor our services to meet guest expectation such as:

Start the day with a fresh and healthy breakfast at Rumba Restaurant and then relax on the MOSS Lobby bar or delight yourself at Garbo 986 with a beautiful opening vibe to the Ba Den mountain enjoy variety selection of cuisines .

Dive into one of our unique inside swimming pools. Exercise in our Fitness center and feel good at any time of the day.

reviews.title: A wonderful experience.
reviews.text:
First of all, I have to say that I had a very good experience at Melia, and what makes me see the biggest difference compared to other hotels is the dedication and enthusiasm of the staff, which is simply perfect. Below, I would like to provide more details about my experience:

- When booking: I rate myself as someone who doesn't manage things well, so when booking, I was quite confused at various steps and had to call the hotel three times to ask and adjust my requests in detail. However, the receptionist was very enthusiastic in assisting me; I really can't complain.

- When arriving and leaving the hotel: There was an employee right there to help me with parking and handling our luggage, who was truly charming and very enthusiastic. The next day, when we had to check out early at 6 AM, that same person came to assist us, always with a lovely smile. What I regret the most is that I didn't leave any tips for them :(( We apologize a lot.

- At the hotel: The reception and waiting area are very luxurious. The receptionist had prepared water for our group during check-in, and the entire process was very quick and efficient. Melia Vinpearl in Tay Ninh even arranged tickets for us to go to Ba Den Mountain. When checking out, the procedure was even quicker, the receptionists were incredibly fast.

- Amenities at the hotel: There are indeed a lot of amenities in this hotel. The massage area is something I found to be the best. The pool is beautiful as well, though I regret that it closes at 8 PM, so we couldn't swim when we came back from our outing :(. 

What made me feel that this experience was not the best was the service for ordering food in the room. I think this is a minor drawback because the menu in my room was old and had faded text, making it look strange. The staff receiving orders was very enthusiastic, 10 points. However, the food was a big downside. The presentation of the dishes was beautiful, but upon closer inspection, I found that the food was partly cooked and partly raw. At first, I thought it was fine, but I ended up having stomach pains for the whole next day. People might think it was due to something else I ate that made me have stomach pains, but actually, apart from the dishes I ordered that day, I didn't eat much else.

But in summary, I still see my experience as an incredibly good one. I managed to book a room at a quite reasonable price, so at first, I was worried that I wouldn't receive enthusiastic service, but Melia Vinpearl Tay Ninh treated and served us exceptionally well. Thank you so much to the hotel and all the staff <3
reviews.response:

Cảm ơn anh và gia đình đã lựa chọn Melia Vinpearl Tay Ninh là địa điểm nghỉ dưỡng và đã để lại một đánh giá tuyệt vời như vậy cho chúng tôi.

reviews.title: Excellent hotel in a nice town.
reviews.text: This is the crown jewel among hotels in Tay Ninh. We enjoyed it very much -- the service is excellent; breakfast was very good; the spa was excellent (for the sauna & steam room; we did not get the massage treatment); the bar was also a nice way to relax a night with the nice breeze. One thing that was very improper was that when you check in, there was a lot of upselling and "offers" to get this and that, and some of it seemed like good deals, but they force you to make a decision on the spot when you check. I am sorry but I do not know if I want a massage tomorrow, but when tomorrow comes, I may not want to pay double the price, so it's a weird system of upselling that leaves you no desire to use the massage services, since such services are only desired on an impromptu basis. Despite this issue, it was a very enjoyable stay.
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Go to worship.
reviews.text: I booked 4 rooms. The hotel arranged them on the same floor and next to each other. My house at Ba Den Mountain booked for 1 night in a 5-star hotel, so everything was okay: clean, beautiful, cool, and the staff were enthusiastic and polite. The rooms are spacious, with a view of the mountain where you can see the statue of the lady on top of the mountain. I booked family rooms with connecting doors, so it was very convenient. However, since I went on the weekend, there were many other guests going for a pilgrimage, so it was crowded. In the morning, when I went down to eat, there was no place to sit inside, so I had to sit outside which was hot, and the food was not as plentiful as other hotels in the Vin chain. The taste was average, neither delicious nor bad. There is a parking garage for those who drive. It's in a central location.
reviews.response:
Xin chào chị Hà,

Cảm ơn chị đã tin tưởng lựa chọn Melia Vinpearl Tây Ninh cho kỳ nghỉ của gia đình và dành thời gian chia sẻ những cảm nhận chân thành sau chuyến đi.

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng gia đình chị hài lòng với chất lượng phòng nghỉ, không gian sạch sẽ, mát mẻ, tầm nhìn tuyệt đẹp hướng về núi Bà Đen, cũng như sự hỗ trợ nhiệt tình, lễ phép từ đội ngũ nhân viên. Việc hỗ trợ sắp xếp các phòng ở cùng tầng, gần nhau và có thiết kế thông nhau để gia đình chị sử dụng thuận tiện là điều chúng tôi luôn nỗ lực mang đến khi có điều kiện.

Chúng tôi cũng xin ghi nhận những góp ý chân thành từ chị về không gian tại nhà hàng phục vụ bữa sáng cũng như sự đa dạng và khẩu vị món ăn. Đây là những phản hồi rất đáng quý để chúng tôi tiếp tục cải thiện và nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ trong thời gian tới.

Một lần nữa, xin chân thành cảm ơn chị và gia đình. Chúng tôi hy vọng sẽ tiếp tục có cơ hội được đón tiếp và phục vụ gia đình chị trong những chuyến ghé thăm Tây Ninh sắp tới.

Trân trọng,
B
